color.grading_style: 그래픽 팝 (Graphic Pop) / 컬러 블록 (Color Block)

texture.detail_rendering: 경광을 활용하여 각 재료의 질감을 극대화하여 표현

improvement_notes: 조명: 반사판이나 약한 필라이트를 사용해 그림자를 약간 부드럽게 하여 입체감 향상. 색감: 배경 채도를 낮추고 음식의 채도를 강조하여 시선 집중. 구도: 타이트하게 크롭하거나 포크로 면을 드는 등 역동적인 연출 추가.
nano_banana_prompt: A vibrant and graphic food photograph of [FOOD NAME], meticulously styled on a table. The scene is split into two bold color blocks: a vivid yellow surface and a solid cobalt blue background. Use hard, direct studio lighting from a high top-left angle to create sharp, dark, dramatic shadows on the right side. The color palette is highly saturated, pop-art style, with strong primary colors. Shot with a 50mm lens at a 45-degree angle, deep depth of field (f/11), everything tack sharp. The overall mood is energetic, modern, and bold. Hyper-detailed, commercial aesthetic, reminiscent of Kodak Ektar 100 film.
